idea: I want to build a website about AI tools for marketers
nicheDescription: Helping marketers discover, evaluate, and use AI tools to do their jobs faster — from content and SEO to ads, email, and analytics.
audience: In-house marketers, marketing managers, and small-agency owners who are AI-curious but not technical
monetization: Affiliate commissions on AI tools + email list for a future paid newsletter
brandPositioning: Practical, vendor-neutral reviews and how-tos — no hype, real testing
